title: B65 9BT, Waste Recycling Group (Central) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/HP3632RP/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Waste Recycling Group (Central) Limited Installation name: Edwin Richards Quarry - Soil Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/HP3632RP/V005  "
